narrative: Bulk Carrier attacked by Bakassi Strike Force remnant approx 265nm offshore. MOA: AK-47 + GPMG armed boarding. Weapons observed: RPG-7. master engaged evasive maneuvers, RPG and small arms fire received.

Fishing Vessel attacked by Niger Delta militant offshoot underway in transit lane. MOA: tanker product theft (siphon). Weapons observed: RPG-7. master engaged evasive maneuvers, RPG and small arms fire received.

LPG/LNG Tanker attacked by Nigerian kidnap-for-ransom cell in narrow channel. MOA: tanker product theft (siphon). Weapons observed: AK-47. boarders rifled bridge & masters cabin, stole cash and electronics; 3 crew taken hostage; ransom demand transmitted within 72h.

Bulk Carrier attacked by Niger Delta militant offshoot approx 270nm offshore. MOA: kidnap-for-ransom of officers. Weapons observed: AK-47. boarders rifled bridge & masters cabin, stole cash and electronics; 2 crew sustained injuries.

RoRo Vehicle Carrier attacked by Trinidad-Tobago smuggler crew underway in transit lane. MOA: small arms intimidation. Weapons observed: small arms. vessel hijacked, crew of 21 taken to coastal anchorage; 17 crew taken hostage; ransom demand transmitted within 72h.

Bulk Carrier attacked by Hobyo-Harardhere PAG in narrow channel. MOA: RPG warning shot then boarding. Weapons observed: knives/machetes. approach broken off after master sounded alarm and engaged firehoses.
